requirement_topic.en: Grid voltage and frequency — nominal system voltage
requirement_topic.zh: 电网电压与频率——额定系统电压
requirement_topic.zht: 電網電壓與頻率——額定系統電壓

summary.en: Jamaica operates a 110/220 V, 50 Hz electrical system in much of its distribution network and industrial sites, with some utility-scale sites using dedicated 11 kV or 33 kV feeders at the point of interconnection. JPS and OUR project review requires PCS and balance-of-system settings to match Jamaica interconnection design assumptions. Frequency alignment is not the major gap, but voltage class is.
summary.zh: 牙买加在多数配电网络及多数工业场景采用110/220V、50Hz系统，部分并网点为11kV或33kV高压并网层级。JPS和OUR项目审查要求BESS的储能变流器及系统参数与牙买加并网设计假设匹配。频率并非主要差异，关键是额定电压类别。
summary.zht: 牙買加在大部分配電網路及多數工業場景採用110/220V、50Hz系統，部分併網點為11kV或33kV高壓併網層級。JPS和OUR項目審查要求BESS的儲能變流器及系統參數與牙買加併網設計假設匹配。頻率不是主要差異，關鍵是額定電壓類別。

standards_or_laws: JPS Interconnection Guide for Power and Distribution Connections
IEC 62933-3-1:2018 (EES systems — environmental and planning context)

summary.en: China domestic utility voltage standards are 220/380 V at 50 Hz under GB/T 12325 and related interconnection practice. Chinese PCS designs for stationary systems are typically rated for this class, so direct reuse for Jamaica is not voltage-correct for 110/220 V downstream operation without adaptation.
summary.zh: 中国国内标准电网电压按GB/T 12325等属于220/380V 50Hz，常规固定储能变流器设计通常按该电压等级定位。若直接用于牙买加110/220V下游系统，通常不具备正确的电压匹配。
summary.zht: 中國國內標準電網電壓依GB/T 12325等屬220/380V 50Hz，常規固定儲能變流器設計通常按該電壓等級定位。若直接用於牙買加110/220V下游系統，通常不具備正確的電壓匹配。

gap.en: VOLTAGE GAP: Jamaica's 110/220 V 50 Hz is unusual and is lower voltage than China’s 220/380 V 50 Hz baseline. PCS firmware, protection settings, transformer ratings, and type-test assumptions must be reconfigured or redesigned for the local voltage class before interconnection.
gap.zh: 电压差距：牙买加110/220V 50Hz与中国220/380V 50Hz存在明显差异。并网前需对储能变流器固件、保护参数、变压器倍率和型式试验假设进行重配置或重设计。
gap.zht: 電壓差距：牙買加110/220V 50Hz與中國220/380V 50Hz存在明顯差異。並網前需對儲能變流器韌體、保護參數、變壓器倍率和型式試驗假設進行重新配置或重設計。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS PCS units built for 220/380 V need electrical adaptation before Jamaican deployment. Re-rate, redesign, or approved transformer-interface engineering is required for safe interconnection to 110/220 V sites and project-specific interface transformers used by JPS.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 按220/380V构建的中国BESS变流器在牙买加部署前通常需要电气适配。应进行重额定、重设计或采用经批准的变压器接口方案，以确保与JPS项目中的110/220V接入条件及安全性匹配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 按220/380V構建的中國BESS變流器在牙買加部署前通常需要電氣適配。應進行重額定、重設計或採用經批准的變壓器接口方案，以確保與JPS項目中的110/220V接入條件及安全性匹配。

requirement_topic.en: Grid-connection technical requirements — IEC 62933 system compliance
requirement_topic.zh: 并网技术要求——IEC 62933系统合规
requirement_topic.zht: 併網技術要求——IEC 62933系統合規

summary.en: Jamaica utility interconnection workflows in practice use IEC 62933-aligned technical language for key BESS behaviors, including protection coordination, anti-islanding, fault ride-through, and power-quality boundaries. OUR and JPS project requirements tend to ask for IEC evidence rather than domestic Chinese documentation references.
summary.zh: 牙买加实际的并网审查流程通常以IEC 62933体系语言验证关键BESS性能行为，包括保护协调、防孤岛、低电压穿越和电能质量边界。OUR和JPS项目要求多要求提供IEC证据，而不是中国国内文件引用。
summary.zht: 牙買加實際的併網審查流程通常以IEC 62933體系語言驗證關鍵BESS性能行為，包括保護協調、防孤島、低電壓穿越和電能質量邊界。OUR和JPS項目要求多要求提供IEC證據，而非中國國內文件引用。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 (Safety requirements for grid-integrated EES systems)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 36558-2022 and GB/T 34131-2017 as domestic grid-connection references. They cover many similar technical themes but are not mapped automatically to Jamaica utility interconnection language. Exporters typically need an explicit IEC evidence set for the target interconnection regime.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 36558-2022和GB/T 34131-2017作为国内并网技术依据。两者虽涵盖许多相似技术主题，但不能自动映射为牙买加效力。出口商通常需提供针对目标并网制度的独立IEC证据。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 36558-2022和GB/T 34131-2017作為國內併網技術依據。兩者雖涵蓋許多相似技術主題，但不能自動映射為牙買加效力。出口商通常需提供針對目標併網制度的獨立IEC證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2017 (Electrochemical energy storage for power stations)

gap.en: Jamaica project documents tied to OUR and JPS processes commonly require IEC 62933 references in addition to domestic production records. GB/T 36558 and GB/T 34131 can support engineering preparation but are not substitutes for submission-level proof in Jamaica review.
gap.zh: 与OUR和JPS流程相关的牙买加项目文件通常要求除国内制造资料外再提供IEC 62933依据。GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131可用于工程准备，但不构成提交审查层面的替代证据。
gap.zht: 與OUR和JPS流程相關的牙買加項目文件通常要求除國內製造資料外再提供IEC 62933依據。GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131可用於工程準備，但不構成提交審查層面的替代證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for utility and project-scale interconnection
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36558 mandatory domestically; not equivalent to IEC 62933 in Jamaica filing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Provide IEC 62933-aligned technical documentation for JPS/OUR review, especially on protection and power-quality behavior. Domestic GB/T documentation remains useful for manufacturer control but does not close the review gap for Jamaican interconnection approvals.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于JPS和OUR审查，应提供IEC 62933对齐的技术文件，尤其是保护与电能质量行为证明。国内GB/T文件对制造管理有帮助，但不足以完成牙买加并网审批。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於JPS和OUR審查，應提供IEC 62933對齊的技術文件，尤其是保護與電能質量行為證明。國內GB/T文件對製造管理有幫助，但不足以完成牙買加併網審批。

requirement_topic.en: Coastal environmental derating — salt-mist, heat, and humidity
requirement_topic.zh: 沿海环境降额——盐雾、高温与高湿
requirement_topic.zht: 沿海環境降額——鹽霧、高溫與高濕

summary.en: Jamaica is a tropical island environment with high salt exposure near ports and frequent high humidity and heat. BESS enclosures and electronics should be rated and derated for coastal exposure and continuous operation conditions expected near installation sites, especially for sites on the Kingston basin and south coastal industrial corridors.
summary.zh: 牙买加是热带岛国，港口和沿海区域长期受高盐雾、热湿环境影响。BESS外壳及电气设备应按预期安装环境进行额定和降额设计，尤其是靠近金斯顿港湾和南部沿海工业走廊的项目。
summary.zht: 牙買加是熱帶島國，港口和沿海區域長期受高鹽霧、熱濕環境影響。BESS外殼及電氣設備應按預期安裝環境進行額定與降額設計，尤其是靠近金斯頓港灣和南部沿海工業走廊的項目。

summary.en: China domestic validation commonly addresses inland and local climate patterns, with many products reporting GB/T 36276 and GB/T 2423 environmental results. While these can be relevant, they are often not proven to the same salt-mist intensity and marine ambient cycle expected for Jamaican coastal deployment.
summary.zh: 中国的验证实践多面向内陆和本地气候，许多产品报告GB/T 36276与GB/T 2423环境测试结果。该内容可部分参考，但对牙买加海岸环境下的高盐雾强度和长期海洋环境循环通常不具备充分证明。
summary.zht: 中國的驗證實踐多面向內陸和本地氣候，許多產品報告GB/T 36276與GB/T 2423環境測試結果。該內容可部分參考，但對牙買加海岸環境下的高鹽霧強度和長期海洋環境循環通常不具備充分證明。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage)

gap.en: Standard Chinese coastal tests are often insufficient for direct Jamaican coastal BESS deployment. Export projects require documentation that explicitly addresses salt-mist severity, venting, sealing, heat derating, and power-control behavior under Jamaican ambient profiles.
gap.zh: 常规中国沿海适应测试通常不足以支撑直接在牙买加沿海环境部署。项目需提供明确覆盖盐雾强度、通风、密封、热降额及在牙买加环境工况下功率控制表现的文件。
gap.zht: 常規中國沿海適應測試通常不足以支撐直接在牙買加沿海環境部署。項目需提供明確覆蓋鹽霧強度、通風、密封、熱降額及在牙買加環境工況下功率控制表現的文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for utility review and civil installation permitting
mandatory_status.cn: Partial — Chinese standards may cover some tests but not full Jamaican coastal evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Jamaican coastal and hot-humid deployments, export kits should include coastal derating curves, updated enclosure sealing strategy, and evidence of IEC 60068-2-52 suitability. Standard Chinese certification packages alone are unlikely to close the full utility review gap.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于牙买加沿海与高温高湿应用，出口项目应提供沿海降额曲线、外壳密封更新策略，以及IEC 60068-2-52适用性证明。仅有标准中国认证包通常不足以闭合项目审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於牙買加沿海與高溫高濕應用，出口項目應提供沿海降額曲線、外殼密封更新策略，以及IEC 60068-2-52適用性證明。僅有標準中國認證包通常不足以閉合項目審查。
